main.description: A pointer to another user's sh.tangled.fyp.feed, saved in the subscriber's own repo. Subscribing stores a reference (the feed AT-URI), never a copy — the author's feed stays the source of truth.

feedUri.description: AT-URI of the subscribed feed: at://<did>/sh.tangled.fyp.feed/<slug>.

addedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this subscription was added.
